purpose: 为无界知识系统维护稳定模块之间的拓扑关系、归属判断和新分支决策，避免每次新增模块都靠局部文件或单张 Canvas 临时归类。
owns: module branch and parent-child ownership decisions
split, merge, retire and new-branch decision records
module-layer-model as a derived owner_layer snapshot
coordination contract between module-governance, information-map, closure, review, diagnostics and Canvas projection
legacy asset ownership audit for new system modules
root project identity placement and ontology-to-module relationship alignment
does_not_own: root-cause repair after a structural defect is confirmed

decision_workflow.output: candidate existing owner, parent module or missing branch
legacy_asset_audit with adopt | migrate | deprecate | archive | exempt_with_reason | queue_follow_up actions
attach_to_existing_module | create_child_module | create_peer_module | create_new_branch | defer_as_draft | merge_or_retire

output: Canvas projection updated or explicitly deferred

required_input: review or diagnostic acceptance when relevant
output: module may be called active/effective only after this proof exists

branch_decision_values.use_when: 新增内容只是现有模块的一份文件、脚本、文档、视图或子资产，没有独立长期责任边界。
新增能力在同一分支内有独立机器真相、路由、校验或生命周期，但仍由一个上级模块语义包含。
新增能力与现有模块同属一个 owner_layer，但责任边界、消费者和闭环状态足够独立。
新增能力无法被现有 owner_layer 表达，并且会形成多个稳定模块、专属真相、路由、校验和可视化生命周期。
边界、消费者或长期责任尚不稳定，只能进入 draft/inbox/archive 生命周期。
现有模块边界被新结构吸收、重复或废弃，需要合并、迁移或归档。

quality_gates: 新增稳定模块前必须先形成 structure_decision_packet，说明归入现有模块、子模块、同级模块、新分支、草稿暂缓或合并归档中的哪一种。
module-layer-model 只是本模块输出的 owner_layer/module_kind 快照，不再单独承担结构判断。
information-map、system-closure-map 和 module-relationship-map 必须覆盖同一组稳定模块。
module-relationship-map 中的关系边只能指向已登记模块，不能指向不存在或未闭环的临时概念。
当结构判断影响重要模块或分支时，必须同步 visual-coverage-map 和对应 Canvas 视图。
新增或升级出的系统模块必须处理职责范围内旧资产：接管、迁移、弃用、归档、说明豁免或登记后续队列；不能只接管未来内容。
A structure-governance decision does not activate a module by itself; activation requires closure-map activation_proof that references legacy asset audit and validation evidence.

legacy_asset_policy.rule: 新系统模块成立时，必须对职责范围内已存在的系统内容负责。结构判断不能只决定未来归属，也必须处理旧资产继承。

latest_existing_layer_relationship_audit.result: Accepted. knowledge-ingestion is added as a system-governance subsystem while inbox and source-registry remain knowledge-content assets; topology, layer snapshot, closure and visual coverage are synchronized.

latest_activation_acceptance.corrected_failure: The first module acceptance treated registration and synchronization as enough. This correction makes activation depend on explicit proof and legacy responsibility evidence.
latest_activation_acceptance.acceptance: system-structure-governance is active only after current_layer_relationship_audit is recorded, closure activation_proof exists, and validate-system checks both.

latest_loop_orchestration_structure_audi.decision: promote loop-orchestration from thin taxonomy-loop surface to stable system-governance module
latest_loop_orchestration_structure_audi.reason: durable loops will serve many future modules and must own registry, lifecycle, state, handoff intake, legacy adoption and visual coverage independent of any single serving module

latest_project_ontology_structure_audit.reason: 知识工程系统根定位是模块分层和 Codex workflow 角色判断的上游契约，不能散落在 README、聊天记忆或 Canvas 标题里。

legacy_asset_actions.result: human project intro now points to knowledge engineering system positioning
human architecture doc reflects system + lifecycle model
Codex integration doc records dual role of workflows
shared visual projection now exposes knowledge engineering root identity
renamed semantically to Codex workflow operation and project invocation while preserving owner_layer id for compatibility

latest_knowledge_ingestion_structure_aud.reason: 知识进入知识库是一条长期稳定、跨 inbox/source/domain/review/diagnostics/loop/index 的系统能力，不能只作为 source-registry 或文档路由的局部说明。
